across.clue: To dictate means to say or read something for someone to write down.
To detect means to notice or find something.
A novelty is something that is new, original, or strange.
Genocide is the deliberate murder of a whole group or race of people.
An enthusiastic person is excited by or interested in something.
something that is compulsory must be done because of a rule or law
A nation is a large area of land that is controlled by its own government.
to accept or admit that something exists is true or is real.
To classify things is to put them into groups based on their type.
A necessity is something that is needed.

down.clue: A janitor is a person who makes repairs and takes care of a building.
A costume is a set of clothes worn to look like someone or something else.
If something is frequent, then it happens or is done often.
If something is ambiguous, it is not entirely clear.
A fountain is a source of water made by people.
the words that an actor says in a performance
If something is radioactive, then it lets out, or is related to, radiation.
An experiment is a test that you do to see what will happen.
Media is the different ways of entertaining and giving information to the public.
A kettle is a large metal pot used for boiling liquids or cooking food.
